action_text: Type "Assigned to" into the list search field
rationale: We need the report that groups incidents by agent; refining the list search to "Assigned to" is the most likely way to surface “Incidents by Assigned to.”

action_text: Apply the list search by pressing Enter
rationale: After entering the search text, we should execute the filter to update the results and locate the correct report.

action_text: Type "Incidents by Assigned to" into the list search field
rationale: Trying the exact likely report title may directly return the single desired report if it exists globally.

action_text: Type "Assignee" into the list search field
rationale: If “Assigned to” doesn’t match, a variant like “Assignee” may match environments that use that wording.

action_text: Scroll down the reports list to see more results
rationale: If the desired report is already in the filtered results but off-screen, scrolling the list may reveal it without changing filters.
